Interface Room

All Known Implementing Classes:
Corridor, EnemyRoom, EventRoom, ExitRoom, GateRoom, HealerRoom, MerchantRoom, TreasureRoom
public sealed interface Room permits Corridor, EnemyRoom, TreasureRoom, MerchantRoom, HealerRoom, ExitRoom, EventRoom, GateRoom
A sealed interface representing a cell or room on the dungeon map. This is the generic type for all elements that compose a floor. Only the types listed in the permits clause can implement this interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    draw(Graphics2D g, int x, int y, int size, ImageLoader img)
    Renders the room's visual representation on the screen.
    default boolean
    isTraversable()
    Indicates whether the hero can pass through this room to reach another destination.
    void
    onClick(Jeu jeu)
    Defines the interaction behavior when the user clicks on this room.

  • Method Details

    • isTraversable

      default boolean isTraversable()
      Indicates whether the hero can pass through this room to reach another destination. By default, rooms are not traversable unless overridden (e.g., Corridors). * @return true if the hero can walk through the room, false otherwise.

    • draw

      void draw(Graphics2D g, int x, int y, int size, ImageLoader img)
      Renders the room's visual representation on the screen. * @param g the graphics context used for drawing.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate on the screen.
      y - the y-coordinate on the screen.
      size - the size of the room tile in pixels.
      img - the loader providing the textures.

    • onClick

      void onClick(Jeu jeu)
      Defines the interaction behavior when the user clicks on this room. * @param jeu the current game instance used to modify game state or notify the player.
